input.content:
name: Dependency License Checker

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      manifest:
        description: Path to manifest
        default: package.json
        required: false
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  MANIFEST_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.manifest || 'package.json' }}
  LICENSE_CONFIG: fixtures/licenses.json
  LICENSE_DB: fixtures/license-db.json

jobs:
  license-check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Install-Module Pester -MinimumVersion 5.0 -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) { exit 1 }

      - name: Run license compliance check
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./Invoke-LicenseChecker.ps1 `
            -ManifestPath $env:MANIFEST_PATH `
            -ConfigPath   $env:LICENSE_CONFIG `
            -LicenseDbPath $env:LICENSE_DB `
            -OutputJson   report.json
          Write-Host "=== report.json ==="
          Get-Content report.json

name: Dependency License Checker

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      manifest:
        description: Path to manifest
        default: package.json
        required: false
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  MANIFEST_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.manifest || 'package.json' }}
  LICENSE_CONFIG: fixtures/licenses.json
  LICENSE_DB: fixtures/license-db.json

jobs:
  license-check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Install-Module Pester -MinimumVersion 5.0 -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) { exit 1 }

      - name: Run license compliance check
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./Invoke-LicenseChecker.ps1 `
            -ManifestPath $env:MANIFEST_PATH `
            -ConfigPath   $env:LICENSE_CONFIG `
            -LicenseDbPath $env:LICENSE_DB `
            -OutputJson   report.json
          Write-Host "=== report.json ==="
          Get-Content report.json

content.text:
All 11 Pester tests pass, actionlint passes, and all 3 act-driven test cases execute the workflow in Docker and match their exact expected SUMMARY lines with "Job succeeded".

Deliverables:
- `LicenseChecker.psm1` — module (manifest parsing, license lookup, compliance check, report builder)
- `LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1` — 11 Pester tests built TDD-style
- `Invoke-LicenseChecker.ps1` — CLI entrypoint with mocked license DB injection
- `fixtures/licenses.json` — allow/deny config
- `.github/workflows/dependency-license-checker.yml` — workflow (push/PR/dispatch/schedule triggers, `shell: pwsh`)
- `Invoke-ActTests.ps1` — harness running 3 act cases + structural/actionlint checks
- `act-result.txt` — captured output for all 3 cases

result:
